pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.x to 3.3.x to align with the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* packages, causing runtime incompatibility and missing API errors on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with the target runtime if the source/target version is not updated to match the JDK 21 environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate the validation API dependency from javax.validation to jakarta.validation-api.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+, so the javax.validation package no longer exists, leading to compile-time 'package not found' errors.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+).

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet.http does not exist'.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+).

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from the legacy javax.validation package to the Jakarta EE namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; code using javax imports will fail to compile due to missing classes.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code using javax imports will fail to compile or encounter ClassNotFoundException at runtime when running on a Jakarta-based container or Spring Boot 3 application.
